writing.task1: Dear Courier Company, I am writing to file a complaint regarding my recent delivery. My parcel, clearly marked “handle with care,” arrived two days later than the scheduled date and was damaged on arrival. I have photos of the broken item as well as tracking records that show the delay. This experience has caused me both inconvenience and loss. I kindly request a full refund for the damaged shipment and hope your company will review its handling and delivery process to prevent this from happening again
writing.task2: I agree to a large extent that social media platforms should require robust age verification to access public content, because young users are highly exposed to harmful material such as misinformation, violence, or exploitation. A clear example is TikTok, which has faced global criticism for its influence on minors, leading several countries to demand stricter age checks to protect children. However, a counter-argument is that strict verification may compromise user privacy and discourage legitimate use. To address this, platforms can adopt privacy-friendly methods that confirm age without collecting unnecessary personal data. This way, safety can be improved while protecting users’ rights
writing.task3: A small table compares two marketing channels over one quarter: Search Ads gained more impressions (1.8M vs. 1.2M) but had a lower CTR (2.4% vs. 3.8%) and a higher CPC ($0.65 vs. $0.52). However, they achieved a better conversion rate (3.1% vs. 2.2%), meaning clicks were more likely to turn into sales. Social Ads are more cost-efficient at generating clicks but weaker at driving final conversions. Overall, shifting a modest portion of budget from Social to Search Ads is recommended to prioritize conversion quality while still maintaining Social for reach and engagement

testData.testTitle: IELTS Starter 2.4 Practice Test (EN–VI) — Paper A
